title: Verify AGVs Are in the "szonestaging" State on the HMI
summary: Confirm on the HMI that the AGVs being checked are displayed in the documented "szonestaging" state before restart or resume actions in AGV fault recovery.
when_to_use: Use this check when AGV fault recovery or restart guidance requires confirmation that AGVs are in the documented ready state before restarting or resuming the system.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to infer readiness from AGV states other than "szonestaging".
Do not use this procedure if the HMI does not display AGV state; escalate instead of guessing the state.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the HMI, identify the AGV state for the AGVs being checked, and confirm whether the displayed state is "szonestaging" before restart or resume actions.

safety_notes: Stop and escalate if the HMI does not show AGV state or if the AGVs are not shown as "szonestaging" when this verification is required.
Do not infer equivalent AGV states that are not explicitly documented in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the HMI showing AGV state

access_required: Access to the HMI showing AGV state
system_preconditions: The AGVs to be checked are identifiable on the HMI.
This verification is being performed as part of a restart or resume decision in AGV fault recovery.
external_references: OptiSweep Operation and Maintenance Manual, page 90, fault recovery guidance referencing AGV state on the HMI.

visual_references.description: Nearby AGV fault recovery screen on page 90 referenced with the instruction to verify AGV status is "szonestaging" on the HMI.

steps.title: Open the HMI view showing AGV state
steps.purpose: Access the HMI area where the AGV state value can be viewed.
steps.instruction: Open or view the HMI area where AGV state is displayed for the AGVs being checked.
steps.expected_result: The HMI view showing AGV state is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV state field or status area is visible on the HMI.
steps.failure_condition: The HMI view does not show AGV state or the relevant AGVs cannot be located.

actions.label: Open AGV state view
actions.exact_action: Open or view the HMI area where AGV state is displayed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the nearby page 90 AGV recovery screen as contextual visual support for the HMI-based AGV status verification; review the AGV status area referenced by the source.

stop_or_escalate_if: The HMI does not show AGV state.
The relevant AGVs cannot be identified on the HMI.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If the system needs to be restarted, make sure the AGVs are in the "szonestaging" state. (Reference AGV state on the HMI.)
Verify AGV status is "szonestaging". (Reference AGV state on HMI.)

steps.title: Identify the AGV state value
steps.purpose: Determine the currently displayed state for the AGVs being checked.
steps.instruction: Identify the AGV state value shown on the HMI for the AGVs being checked.
steps.expected_result: A visible AGV state value is identified for each AGV being checked.
steps.healthy_condition: The HMI clearly shows a readable AGV state value.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV state value is missing, unreadable, or ambiguous.

actions.label: Read AGV state
actions.exact_action: Identify the AGV state value for the AGVs being checked.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the AGV status/state information referenced by the page 90 recovery guidance.

stop_or_escalate_if: The AGV state value is not displayed.
The AGV state value cannot be read clearly.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If the system needs to be restarted, make sure the AGVs are in the "szonestaging" state. (Reference AGV state on the HMI.)
Verify AGV status is "szonestaging". (Reference AGV state on HMI.)

steps.title: Verify the state is "szonestaging"
steps.purpose: Confirm the AGVs meet the documented state requirement before restart or resume actions.
steps.instruction: Verify that the displayed AGV state is exactly "szonestaging" for the AGVs being checked.
steps.expected_result: The AGVs are confirmed either to be in "szonestaging" or not in the required state.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed AGV state is exactly "szonestaging".
steps.failure_condition: The displayed AGV state is not "szonestaging" or an equivalent state would need to be assumed.

actions.label: Confirm required state
actions.exact_action: Verify that the displayed AGV state is "szonestaging".

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Confirm the AGV status/state matches the documented value "szonestaging" referenced by the source.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed AGV state is not "szonestaging".
The state appears similar but is not explicitly documented as "szonestaging".

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If the system needs to be restarted, make sure the AGVs are in the "szonestaging" state. (Reference AGV state on the HMI.)
Verify AGV status is "szonestaging". (Reference AGV state on HMI.)

steps.title: Confirm readiness before restart or resume
steps.purpose: Document or communicate whether the AGVs meet the required ready-state check before proceeding.
steps.instruction: Record or confirm that the AGVs are in the documented ready state before proceeding with restart or resume actions.
steps.expected_result: A clear confirmation is made that the AGVs are in the documented ready state, or escalation is initiated if they are not.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGVs have been confirmed as being in "szonestaging" before restart or resume actions.
steps.failure_condition: The AGVs cannot be confirmed in "szonestaging" before restart or resume actions.

actions.label: Confirm ready state
actions.exact_action: Record or confirm that the AGVs are in the documented ready state before proceeding with restart or resume actions.

stop_or_escalate_if: The AGVs cannot be confirmed in "szonestaging".
Restart or resume would require proceeding without the documented state verification.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If the system needs to be restarted, make sure the AGVs are in the "szonestaging" state. (Reference AGV state on the HMI.)
Verify AGV status is "szonestaging". (Reference AGV state on HMI.)

success_criteria: The HMI displays AGV state for the AGVs being checked.
The displayed AGV state is confirmed as exactly "szonestaging".
The AGVs are confirmed in the documented ready state before restart or resume actions.
healthy_conditions: AGV state is visible on the HMI.
The AGV state value is readable and unambiguous.
failure_conditions: The HMI does not show AGV state.
The AGV state cannot be identified or read.
The AGV state is not "szonestaging" when this verification is required.
Proceeding would require inferring an undocumented equivalent state.
escalation_guidance: Stop and escalate if the HMI does not show AGV state.
Stop and escalate if the AGVs are not shown as "szonestaging" when this verification is required.
Do not infer equivalent AGV states that are not explicitly documented in the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Contextual AGV recovery screen on page 90 associated with the instruction to verify AGV status is "szonestaging" on the HMI.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: If the system needs to be restarted, make sure the AGVs are in the "szonestaging" state. (Reference AGV state on the HMI.)
Verify AGV status is "szonestaging". (Reference AGV state on HMI.)
